segment.source: You can't delete the Admin user
{count, plural, one {# item tagged} other {# items tagged}}
segment.target: {count, plural, one {# enhed tagget} other {# enheder tagget}}

segment.source: Item {item} is now marked as loaned
segment.target: Enhed {item} er nu registreret som udlånt
Udlån af enhed {item} er blevet annulleret

segment.source: Item {item} is now mark as returned
segment.target: Enhed {item} er nu registreret som returneret

segment.source: Your settings have been successfully updated
segment.target: Dine indstillinger er blevet opdateret med succes

segment.source: {count, plural, one {# tag deleted} other {# tags deleted}}
segment.target: {count, plural,one {# tag slettet} other {# tags slettet}}

segment.source: Wish {wish} was transferred to the collection {collection}
Public - Reason : your profile is public
segment.target: Offentlig - Årsag : din profil er offentlig

segment.source: Public - Reason : both your profile and this page are public
segment.target: Offentlig - Årsag : både din profil og denne side er offentlige

segment.source: Private - Reason : both your profile and this page are private
segment.target: Privat - Årsag : både din profil og denne side er private

segment.source: Private - Reason : your profile is private
segment.target: Privat - Årsag : din profil er privat

segment.source: Private - Reason : this page is private
segment.target: Privat - Årsag : denne side er privat

segment.source: Internal - Reason : both your profile and this page are internal
segment.target: Intern - Årsag : både din profil og denne side er interne

segment.source: Internal - Reason : your profile is internal
segment.target: Intern - Årsag : din profil er intern

segment.source: Internal - Reason : this page is internal
segment.target: Intern - Årsag : denne side er intern

segment.source: Are you sure you want to delete this photo ? It will be permanently lost...
segment.target: Er du sikker på du vil slette dette foto? Det bliver væk for altid...

segment.source: {count, plural, one {# choice list} other {# choice lists}}

segment.target: Indsend og tilføj en anden enhed

segment.source: Add a new photo to the album {album}
segment.target: Tilføj et nyt billede til albummet {album}

segment.source: If you set visibility to public, your collection will be accessible by anyone using the following link :
segment.target: Hvis du sætter synlighed til offentlig, vil din samling være tilgængelig for alle, der bruger følgende link:

segment.source: Items added per day of month
segment.target: Enheder tilføjet per dag i måneden

segment.source: Add a new item to the wishlist {wishlist}
segment.target: Tilføj en ny enhed til ønskelisten {wishlist}

segment.source: A single place to manage all your collections.
segment.target: Et enkelt sted til at administrere alle dine samlinger.

segment.source: Your profile is set to private, you can't share this page.
segment.target: Din profil er indstillet til privat, du kan ikke dele denne side.

segment.source: You can share this link so people can see this page (private items will be hidden) :
segment.target: Du kan dele dette link, så folk kan se denne side (private enheder vil blive skjult) :

segment.source: You are offline, please check your connection.
segment.target: Du er offline, kontroller din forbindelse.

segment.source: If checked, tags will be applied to all sub-collections as well
segment.target: Hvis markeret vil tags også blive tilføjet til alle delsamlinger

segment.source: Are you sure you want to delete this tag ? It will be permanently lost...
segment.target: Er du sikker på at du vil slette dette tag? Sletningen er permanent...

segment.source: Are you sure you want to delete this item ? It will be permanently lost...
segment.target: Er du sikker på at du vil slette denne enhed? Sletningen er permanent...

segment.source: Are you sure you want to delete this album ? All photos it contains will be permanently lost...
segment.target: Er du sikker på at du vil slette dette album? Alle inkluderede fotos bliver slettet permanent...

segment.source: Are you sure you want to delete this template ? It will be permanently lost...
segment.target: Er du sikker på at du vil slette denne skabelon? Sletningen er permanent...

segment.source: Are you sure you want to delete this wishlist ? All wishes it contains will be permanently lost...
segment.target: Er du sikker på du vil slette denne ønskeliste? Alle ønsker, den indeholder forsvinder for altid...

segment.source: Are you sure you want to delete this wish ? It will be permanently lost...
segment.target: Er du sikker på at du vil slette dette ønske? Sletningen er permanent...

segment.source: Are you sure you want to delete this collection ? All items it contains will be permanently lost...
segment.target: Er du sikker på at du vil slette denne samling? Alle inkluderede enheder bliver slettet permanent...

segment.source: Are you sure you want to delete this loan ? It will be permanently lost...
segment.target: Er du sikker på at du vil slette dette udlån? Sletningen er permanent...

segment.source: Are you sure you want to delete this inventory ?
segment.target: Er du sikker på at du vil slette denne opgørelse?

segment.source: Are you sure you want to delete this tag category ? It will be permanently lost...
segment.target: Er du sikker på at du vil slette denne tag-kategori? Sletningen er permanent...

segment.source: Are you sure you want to delete this user ? It will be permanently lost...
segment.target: Er du sikker på du vil slette denne bruger? Den bliver væk for altid...
